programme.title: Day 4 - Simonne-Mathieu Court - Roland Garros 2026
programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Madrid Jumping - Round 1 - Competition Team
programme.desc: The 2026 Madrid round takes place from 15–17 May at Club de Campo Villa de Madrid, as part of the elite global show jumping circuit. The event features three days of top-level CSI5* action, highlighted by the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid on Sunday, where leading riders and horses compete for key championship points.

programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. programme.title: L.D.U. Quito (ECU) vs Always Ready (BOL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD6
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Buenos Aires P1
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Panenka: Game Changer | E1
programme.desc: A documentary about Antonin Panenka, the man who invented a new way of taking penalties.

programme.title: Peñarol (URU) vs Santa Fe (COL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD6
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Nice vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Nice lost the reverse fixture against Metz 1-2 on 9 November, but they have not lost both league matches against them in a single Ligue 1 season since 1995-96. Nice have lost two of their last three home Ligue 1 games against Metz, as many as in their previous 22.

programme.title: Lille vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Auxerre are the current Ligue 1 side against whom Lille have their highest percentage of defeats, but LOSC are unbeaten in their last nine top-flight meetings with AJA. Lille have failed to score in only one of their last 14 home Ligue 1 matches against Auxerre, a 0-2 defeat in March 2008.

programme.title: Brest vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Brest have won four of their last five Ligue 1 matches against Angers, having won only one of their first eight such meetings. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: Montpellier vs Poitiers - Finals 2nd leg - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
programme.desc: France have never lost against Morocco, with all five of their previous meetings coming in friendlies. The most recent encounter was a 2-2 draw in Saint-Denis in November 2007. France have alternated between victory and defeat in their six World Cup meetings with African nations, losing 1-0 against Tunisia last time out in this year's group stage.

programme.title: Argentina vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 1
programme.desc: This is the third World Cup meeting between Argentina and Croatia, and first in the knockout stages. Argentina won 1-0 in 1998, before Croatia's 3-0 win in the 2018 edition in Russia. Argentina are looking to reach the World Cup final for the sixth time, a figure bettered only by Germany. They've never been eliminated at the semi-final stage before

programme.title: Croatia vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 3rd Place
programme.desc: This is the second meeting between Croatia and Morocco at this World Cup, having played out a 0-0 draw on MD1. programme.title: Campeones Argentina
programme.desc: "Re-live an unforgettable month in Qatar as the World Cup came to the Middle East for the first time, culminating in the most outstanding World Cup final ever. Over four episodes, the series will look into the pride of the Arabic nations and their performances, the games and moments that stood out throughout the tournament, the journey of Argentina

programme.desc: 16-Episode Series offering a cinematic exploration of the "soccer soul" of each FIFA World Cup 2026 host city. Uncover the cultural, grassroots, and community dimensions of football across North America.

FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview - Ep 1
programme.desc: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, held across Canada, Mexico, and the USA from June 11 to July 19, 2026, will be the largest ever with 48 teams and 104 matches, significantly expanding the competition format. This series provides key previews, team analysis and player profiles of the greatest show on earth.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview - Ep 2
programme.desc: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, held across Canada, Mexico, and the USA from June 11 to July 19, 2026, will be the largest ever with 48 teams and 104 matches, significantly expanding the competition format. This series provides key previews, team analysis and player profiles of the greatest show on earth.

programme.desc: A look back at the key moments from 2018 World Cup in Russia, with France eventually facing Croatia in the Final.

programme.title: Day 4 - Court 14 - Roland Garros 2026
programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: Race 1 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
programme.desc: The weekend opens with a straight fight from qualifying pace. A clean launch, disciplined braking into Turn 1, and strong exits onto the short straights can turn grid spot into podium. With heavy machines and cold brakes, early laps are risk-reward; settle quickly, manage water and brake temps, and bank the first big haul of points.

programme.title: beIN SPORTS XTRA
programme.desc: beIN SPORTS XTRA For Live And Exclusive Coverage of Premuim Sporting Events

programme.title: Race 2 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
programme.desc: Reverse-grid stakes raise the tension, rewarding quick racecraft and clean overtakes. Drivers exploit the tow up to Dunlop and pressure rivals into track-limits errors. Penalties loom for contact, so precision matters. Teams tweak pressures and brake balance after Race 1 data; a bold move at the Chicane can unlock the win and momentum.

programme.title: Race 3 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
programme.desc: Back to outright pace as qualifying form returns to the fore. By now rubbered-in lines improve traction, but rising temps stress cooling and brakes on the 4.185 km lap. Race rhythm and patience through the infield are key; defend smartly, attack decisively, and protect tyres for late-race sprints to the line.
